getGasCostUSD().notice: Returns estimated gas cost in USD (WAD).

getSuggestedRange(bytes32,uint8).notice: Suggests an optimal tick range using XenorizeMath + current volatility.

getTokenPriceUSD(address).notice: Returns current token price in USD (WAD = $1)

getVolatility(bytes32).notice: Returns rolling volatility in BPS for a pool.         Based on the std-dev of the last VOL_WINDOW price samples.

recordPrice(bytes32,address).notice: Records a current price snapshot for a pool (used for vol calculation).         Anyone can call — price is fetched from Chainlink, not user-supplied.
